rag_rules: Place AGREE assumptions and guarantees in component type scopes when they refer to ports, and implementation scopes for subcomponent bindings.
Do not introduce package-qualified identifiers or types not present in the AADL model.
generic_rules: Preserve AADL component structure and scope rules during AGREE annex fusion.
Only include AGREE clauses that align with the modeled component ports and data types.
Avoid introducing invented constraints or assumptions not explicitly stated in requirements.
Ensure AGREE annex blocks are placed in valid AADL annex locations (type vs implementation).
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts must be enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks.
Use valid AADL identifiers and types from the input model; do not invent new ones.
anti_patterns: Do not place implementation-level bindings in component type scopes or vice versa.
Do not assume numeric or Boolean encodings for event ports without explicit model support.
irrelevant_topics: AGREE assume/guarantee syntax and validator diagnostics
